🧾 Create Invoice

From

Business details for the invoice sender.

To

Recipient information for this invoice.

Invoice Date

Use today or set a different billing date.

Create Invoice

Add Line Items

Use assigned work when available, or add a manual line item in the same section.

1 Choose project
2 Choose estimate
3 Import approved items
Available line items Approved or completed items are selectable.
Step 1: choose a project to load available estimates.

Select items, then import them into the invoice table below.

Or

Add Manually

Use this when the item is not in assigned work or you need a custom entry.
